apps.name: BeReal: Photos & Friends Daily
advisories: Infrequent/Mild Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
apps.description:
BeReal is the simplest photo-sharing app where you and your friends post once a day to show what you’re really up to.

Every day at a random time, everyone gets the same two-minute window to take and share a photo. The camera snaps both the front and back simultaneously, capturing the real moment. No filters — just real life, as it happens.

You won’t find influencers here. You’ll find your friends making coffee, walking to class, lying on the floor, laughing at nothing, or stuck in traffic. It’s not about looking perfect. It’s about being present and staying connected in a way that’s honest, unfiltered, and sometimes unintentionally hilarious.

Post on time or post late—it still counts. Comment, react with your face using RealMojis, or just scroll through your circle’s day. Your BeReal feed is private by default, unless you choose to go public and see what others are up to around the world.

If you’re tired of chasing clout and scrolling endless edits, BeReal is your once-a-day reset. One daily notification. Two minutes. Real friends, real moments.

Download BeReal and join the social network that’s not trying to be one.
apps.subtitle: Share real moments, no filters

apps.name: Infantry Attack: Battle 3D FPS
apps.description:
Soldier! Are you bored by playing Battle Royale games? World War 3 is coming, and duty calls you! Enemies are invading our country, and we need YOU to defend it, so take your weapons and be ready for the battle! 

* Key features of this first-person shooter game *
- Easy controls to aim and shoot enemies
- FPS view to enjoy the action on the battlefield
- Fight various enemy troops and discover different warzones.
- Modern war weapons: machine gun, rocket launcher and sniper

* Defend the country against enemy soldiers *
Enemy troops such as infantry, helicopters, tanks, warplanes and drones are coming for you! Jump on the machine gun and shoot them all! No World War I (WW1) or World War II (WW2) old fashion weapons here, you handle brand-new modern weapons to shoot enemies. 

* Fight with your military crew and defeat the opponent's army *
You’re not doing war alone, your squad is here to help you: Sam has an RPG rocket launcher to deal high damage to military vehicles, and Ryan, our deadly sniper, will shoot at high range on the open battlefield. You are in charge of the machine gun to clear the battlefield, highly addictive and enjoyable! 

* Go through the solo campaign with multiple warzones *
Missions will take place on different warzones and you will need to adapt your shooting strategy depending on the battlefield: city, desert, jungle, forest, airport and many more! Be on the frontline of the battleground or take to the air for shooting enemies from the helicopter! 

* Upgrade your loadout to win the war *
Beware! Combat will be tough and enemies stronger over time so upgrading your guns (machine gun, rocket launcher and sniper rifle) won’t be enough. Level up teammates and make your military crew ready for shooting waves of soldiers. 

* Fight and kill bosses *
Deadly and heavily armed bosses will challenge you through the war and only sharpened skilled players will survive. To win the battle you will need to aim right and use smartly the weapons and kill-strikes at your disposal. Do you have what it takes to deliver the country from invaders and win the war? 

* Easy control and realistic graphics for intense action *
We have simplified the controls in order to let you enjoy the action in this first-person shooter (FPS). Press your thumb to shoot, aim by scrolling the screen and enjoy the battle!

apps.name: Heisting
advisories: Infrequent/Mild Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
apps.description:
What could be more exciting than the thrill of a perfectly executed heist? In Heisting you are set into the role of a masterful thief who embarks on a stealing spree across the world's most luxurious museums, galleries, banks and many more. Gather your crew of robbers and hash out the perfect plan as you progress through increasingly difficult levels.

If things go wrong, and believe me they will go wrong, it will be up to your skills to shoot your way out to safety. Choose your upgrades carefully as they could be a difference between a big pay day and a messy failure.

As you progress, you will need to convince more and more robbers to join your gang and help you with your heists. In order for the heist to be completed you will need to steal everything in your sight.

Sometimes the enemy guards will be so tough you will have to sacrifice some of your robbers in a big shootout. But the pay day at the end of it will be much worth it. You will encounter different enemies that will try to prevent you from taking your loot, and you'll need to adapt a unique strategy to get around each of them.

Enjoy the road to becoming a fantastically rich millionaire who has more money than he knows what to do with. But you will also have to invest in your heisting gear and gang of robbers to ensure you are successful in bringing home the money.

Have you ever wondered what it would be like to steal valuable items or rob banks to grow your criminal empire and become ridiculously rich? Then this game is perfect for you. Immerse yourself in a world where everything is yours for the taking. How much money can you get? The sky's the limit!

If you’re really good, this game allows you to make so much money that you will literally be richer than any millionaire. In fact, with the amount of money you can make, millionaires will feel like beggars compared to you! And if that wasn’t enough, think of the power you’ll feel as you lead a massive army of robbers to demolish the opposition and claim extraordinarily valuable treasures for yourself.

Featuring:
- Unique hand crafted heisting levels.
- A colorful gang of robbers to help you
- Progressive upgrade system
- Bonus stealth levels
- Big pay days for you and your crew
- Rapidly increasing wealth system

So what are you waiting for?
Go out there and claim what is rightfully yours!

apps.name: Last Survivor - Zombie Shooter

Survive the relentless onslaught of the undead and rogue human factions in this intense third-person shooter, set in a gritty post-apocalyptic world. Your survival depends on sharp shooting, tactical decisions, and quick thinking as you face ruthless zombie hordes, rival human groups, and formidable bosses. Will you emerge as the ultimate Zombie Survivor in this chaotic wasteland?

SIMPLE CONTROLS, THRILLING SURVIVAL SHOOTING With intuitive controls, just aim, shoot, and take cover! No complex button mashing—release your finger to dodge and reload. LOOT AND UPGRADE Play to earn crate boxes filled with gear, upgrade materials, and valuable currencies. Discover a variety of weapons to enhance your loadout, from Soldier Shooting precision rifles to heavy-duty Weapon Shooting firepower. Every crate brings you closer to dominating the battlefield.

ACHIEVEMENTS AND GLORY Prove your skills by unlocking achievements as you take down enemies and bosses. Only the best can claim victory in this unforgiving world.

FACE EPIC BOSSES Take on the deadliest foes in Boss Rush mode, where each boss presents new challenges. Survive these high-stakes battles to earn special rewards and cement your legacy in this apocalyptic wasteland.

A WORLD TORN APART The world has fallen into chaos. As the last hope, it’s up to you to take on the threats of this ruined land, from Mafia shootouts to endless waves of zombies. Equip your weapons, devise your strategy, and fight for survival in this immersive post-apocalyptic shooter.

Upgrade your gear for stronger combat abilities
Discover rare loot and upgrades through crate boxes

The more rows you clear, the more points you get and the higher your level goes. Rotate and move the blocks to fit them better in the available space, but don't let them stack up too high or touch the top of the screen or you'll lose. This game is fun, challenging and relaxing at the same time. It tests your spatial skills, your reflexes and your creativity. Try it out and see how many rows you can clear and how high you can score!

Sand Blocks is a Tetris like sand puzzle game that combines satisfactory sand simulation with a beautiful art style.
